home.hero_subtitle: Gqom from Komani, Eastern Cape — bringing the sound to your event.
home.about_bio: DJ Ntsira is Lituko Siphe, a Gqom specialist from Komani (Queenstown), Eastern Cape. His music speaks to everyone.
home.music_preview_sub: Preview and buy directly — no cart needed.
home.no_tracks_message: New music is on the way. Check back soon!
home.booking_cta_body: Book DJ Ntsira for your next event — day or night, anywhere in the Eastern Cape.

booking.title: Book DJ Ntsira
booking.hospitality_ack: I confirm sound system, lighting, DJ booth and water will be provided.
booking.deposit_notice: A 50% non-refundable deposit is required to confirm your booking.
booking.transport_notice: A transport fee applies for venues more than 20km from Queenstown.
